rationale: Educ. Code §11.062 governs election of school district trustees and officers. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal. No conflict exists.
quote: An independent school district in which, before September 1, 1995, part of the trustees were elected from single-member trustee districts and one or more board officers were elected at large shall continue electing trustees and officers in that manner until a different method of selection is adopted by resolution of the board of trustees.
_note: Rule text concerns school district governance elections, unrelated to homestead exemption valuation.
